name: kcubegl
description: kCube — a 3D dice-rolling puzzle playable in the browser (WebGL via Three.js).

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/shared.mjs && node --check src/level-gen.mjs && node --check src/solver.mjs && node --check src/catalog-solve.mjs && node --check src/api.mjs && node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/login.mjs && node --check src/settings.mjs && node --check src/admin.mjs && node --check server/db.mjs && node --check server/server.mjs && node --check server/webauthn.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:smoke
